scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc ]; then node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc --noEmit; else echo "Skipping vue-tsc during build because node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc is not installed."; fi' && vite build
scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc ]; then exec node_modules/.bin/vue-tsc --noEmit; else echo "vue-tsc is not installed. Run npm install to restore devDependencies." >&2; exit 127; fi'
